summary: End-to-end testing of Dr. Sharma Dental Clinic landing page. Backend pytest suite (5 tests) all pass: GET /api/clinic returns expected JSON, POST /api/appointments creates with validation, GET /api/appointments returns list sorted desc with no _id leakage, validation rejects missing fields and short name. Frontend Playwright tests all pass: hero/booking sections render with correct data-testids, call buttons use tel: hrefs and WhatsApp uses wa.me, empty form submission shows toast error, full submission shows booking-success state, admin page lists newly created appointment, sticky-mobile-cta hidden on desktop and visible on mobile viewport (390x844).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: created_at is stored as ISO string but Appointment model expects datetime; the in-memory conversion on read works but storing native datetime in Mongo would be cleaner and avoid sort-as-string fragility.
Admin page is publicly accessible at /admin without auth - acceptable for demo but should be protected for production.
BookingSection error handling on POST failure shows generic toast but does not surface backend validation errors (422) to the user.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_-prefixed appointments via POST /api/appointments during testing; safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All review_request items pass. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_clinic_api.py. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Service select option testid pattern: service-option-<slug> (e.g., service-option-teeth-whitening).
